Project image template

Put project files in folders like:

/public/projects/nova-fintech/cover.webp
/public/projects/nova-fintech/shot-01.webp
/public/projects/nova-fintech/shot-02.webp
/public/projects/terraki/cover.webp
/public/projects/lume/cover.webp

Then update src/lib/backend/projects.ts with those file paths.
